problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: Combining Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
